evidence_refs.source_quote: As of December 31, 2023 , NYCT's workforce consisted of 48,025 employees
females represented 19% (9,353)
minorities represented 83% (39,701)
veterans represented 2% (1,031)

tool_args.label: NYCT Workforce Net Increase Q4 2022 to Q4 2023

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA NYCT 4 th Quarter 2023 workforce increased by 948 employees
Female representation remained the same with an increase of 560 employees
Minority representation increased by 1 percentage point with an increase of 1,238 employees
MTA NYCT handled* a total of 336 EEO complaints; of which 114 were internal and 222 were external
114 were internal
222 were external
During 2023, NYCT received a total of 139 EEO complaints; of which 83 were internal and 56 were external (including lawsuits)
83 were internal
56 were external (including lawsuits)
MTA NYCT received 12 Title VI complaints and no lawsuits during this time period
MTA NYCT hired 4,192 employees, 1,251 females and 2,941 males
MTA NYCT hired 4,192 employees, 1,251 females and 2,941 males
MTA NYCT hired 4,192 employees, 1,251 females and 2,941 males
2,890 employees separated from MTA NYCT, 628 females and 2,262 males

payload.claim_text: Based on the utilization analysis, underrepresentation for females occurred in: Professions – Whites, Technicians – Whites, Protective Services – Hispanics/Asians/Whites, Paraprofessional – Asians/AI/AN, Service Maintenance – Hispanics/Whites. Underrepresentation for minority males occurred in: Officials and Administrators – Blacks, Paraprofessionals – Blacks/Hispanics/AI/AN, Service Maintenance – Hispanics.
payload.description: MTA NYCT underutilization findings identifying specific EEO categories and race/ethnicity groups where females and minority males are underrepresented compared to labor market availability

payload.claim_text: MTA NYCT's action strategy includes: forecast future opportunities, identify specific job titles within underutilized EEO categories, meet with People Department for historical data, departmental engagement with Department Heads, customized strategies for job titles, focus on underutilized categories with Transit Property Protection Agent and Bus Operator identified for females and Cleaner and Station Agent for minority males
payload.description: Action strategy to address underutilization areas
